title: PROCTOR FOSTER CARE - 211info
text: FAMILY SOLUTIONS ASHLAND PROCTOR FOSTER CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individualized community-based treatment for children and youth with severe emotional and behavioral issues. Children and resource (foster) parents are matched, one to two children per home. Children receive individual, group, and family therapy. Skills training, mentoring, case management, and other individualized services offered. Respite care available to foster parents. This is an alternative to BRS residential care, allowing the child to remain in a home environment and community setting. 1836 Fremont Street Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Ages 4-18 who have behavioral issues that require them to be placed in a more specialized foster home with extra support. Must be involved with ODHS Child Welfare. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 916-4777 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 916-4777 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Must be referred by ODHS Child Welfare FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson and Josephine Counties Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Child Guidance * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - OUTPATIENT THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSYCHIATRIC DAY TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
